tasks.label: Git Status and Commit README
tasks.command:
git status && git add README.md && git commit -m "📚 Enhanced README.md with comprehensive documentation

- Added professional badges for all technologies
- Created detailed feature comparison table
- Enhanced quick start with multiple options
- Added comprehensive project structure overview
- Detailed VS Code integration documentation
- Performance benchmarking guidelines
- Troubleshooting section with common issues
- Customization and contribution guidelines
- Learning resources and acknowledgments
- Professional formatting and organization"

tasks.label: Commit README and gitignore
tasks.command:
git add README.md .gitignore && git commit -m "📚 Enhanced README.md with comprehensive documentation

- Added professional badges for all technologies
- Created detailed feature comparison table
- Enhanced quick start with multiple options
- Added comprehensive project structure overview
- Detailed VS Code integration documentation
- Performance benchmarking guidelines
- Troubleshooting section with common issues
- Customization and contribution guidelines
- Learning resources and acknowledgments
- Professional formatting and organization

Also updated .gitignore to allow committing documentation files"

tasks.label: Force commit README and gitignore
tasks.command:
git add -f README.md .gitignore && git commit -m "📚 Enhanced README.md with comprehensive documentation and updated .gitignore

✨ README.md enhancements:
- Added professional badges for all technologies
- Created detailed feature comparison table
- Enhanced quick start with multiple options
- Added comprehensive project structure overview
- Detailed VS Code integration documentation
- Performance benchmarking guidelines
- Troubleshooting section with common issues
- Customization and contribution guidelines
- Learning resources and acknowledgments
- Professional formatting and organization

🔧 Updated .gitignore to allow committing documentation files"

tasks.label: 🐳 Check Container Tools
tasks.command: echo '=== Container Tools Status ===' && echo 'Docker:' && docker --version && echo 'Podman:' && podman --version && echo 'kubectl:' && kubectl version --client --short && echo 'Node.js:' && node --version && echo 'npm:' && npm --version

tasks.label: 🔍 Show All Containers
tasks.command: echo '=== Docker Containers ===' && docker ps -a && echo '' && echo '=== Podman Containers ===' && podman ps -a

tasks.label: 🖼️ Show All Images
tasks.command: echo '=== Docker Images ===' && docker images && echo '' && echo '=== Podman Images ===' && podman images

tasks.label: ⚡ Benchmark All Builds
tasks.command: echo '🚀 Starting build benchmark...' && echo '' && echo '⏱️ Docker Classic:' && time ./scripts/build_docker.sh && echo '' && echo '⏱️ Docker BuildKit:' && time ./scripts/build_buildkit.sh && echo '' && echo '⏱️ Podman:' && time ./scripts/build_podman.sh && echo '' && echo '⏱️ Kaniko:' && time ./scripts/build_kaniko_local.sh && echo '' && echo '✅ Benchmark complete!'

tasks.label: 🧹 Deep Clean All
tasks.command: echo '🧹 Deep cleaning Docker...' && docker system prune -af && echo '🧹 Deep cleaning Podman...' && podman system prune -af && echo '🧹 Cleaning npm cache...' && npm cache clean --force && echo '✅ Deep clean complete!'
